chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1724 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 6780/25 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025 Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Rashid Ahmed Shaikh, Director (Admin) Federal Ombudsman, (Wafaqi Muhtsib), Karachi.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is second call at 11:45 A.M, non appeared on behalf of the petitioners. The parawise comments on behalf of respondents NO.1 to 6 have been filed by Director (Admin) Wafaqi Muhtsib, Karachi, along with certain documents same are taken on record. Perusal of the comments and annexed documents, reflects that entire process has been completed and now only formal orders are to be issued to the selected candidates. Director who is present in the Court stated that petitioners themselves applied and participated in the process, however they declared failed in written test. Since no one is in attendance from the petitioner’s side and they have also been declared failed in written test. Therefore, instant petition is dismissed in non prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
